Afghanistan Discovery Tour Spring

From $1,890 9 Days Group: Private or 2–8 travelers Apr-Jun Activity: Moderate
Overview

About This Tour

The Discovery Tour is a balanced overview of Afghanistan’s highlights, combining major cities, cultural landmarks, and natural scenery.

Regions: West, Central
Provinces: Kabul, Bamyan, Parwan, Wardak, Herat
Travel Style: Cultural / Scenic
Day by Day

Tour Itinerary

  1. 1
    Day 1 Kabul

    Arrival & Orientation

    “Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and a relaxed orientation Sightseeing depending on arrival time.”

    Short city transfers.

  2. 2
    Day 2 Kabul

    Drive Kabul–Panjshir

    “Drive from Kabul to Panjshir via Parwan. Sightseeing on the way in and out of the valley with optional hike in the valley.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

  3. 3
    Day 3 Bamyan

    Drive Kabul–Bamyan

    “Drive from Kabul to Bamyan via Parwan or Wardak depending on road conditions. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Bamyan.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

  4. 4
    Day 4 Bamyan

    Band-e-Amir National Park

    “Depart early morning for a day trip to see Band-e-Amir National Park.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

  5. 5
    Day 5 Ghazni

    Drive Bamyan-Ghazni

    “Drive from Bamyan to Ghazni via Wardak. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Ghazni.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

  6. 6
    Day 6 Ghazni

    Ghazni Sightseeing

    “A day of sightseeing in Ghazni.”

    Short city transfers.

  7. 7
    Day 7 Kabul

    Drive Ghazni-Kabul

    “Drive from Ghazni. Sightseeing in Kabul, depending on travel times.”

    Drive times vary; conditions may affect timing.

  8. 8
    Day 8 Kabul

    Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

  9. 9
    Day 9 Kabul

    Airport Transfer - Depart from Kabul

    “Hotel check-out and Airport Drop-off, departing flights from Kabul.”

    Short city transfers.

What's Included

Tour Inclusions

  • Arrival & Orientation

    “Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and a relaxed orientation Sightseeing depending on arrival time.”

  • Drive Kabul–Panjshir

    “Drive from Kabul to Panjshir via Parwan. Sightseeing on the way in and out of the valley with optional hike in the valley.”

  • Drive Kabul–Bamyan

    “Drive from Kabul to Bamyan via Parwan or Wardak depending on road conditions. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Bamyan.”

  • Band-e-Amir National Park

    “Depart early morning for a day trip to see Band-e-Amir National Park.”

  • Drive Bamyan-Ghazni

    “Drive from Bamyan to Ghazni via Wardak. Sightseeing depending on travel times on the way into Ghazni.”

  • Ghazni Sightseeing

    “A day of sightseeing in Ghazni.”

  • Drive Ghazni-Kabul

    “Drive from Ghazni. Sightseeing in Kabul, depending on travel times.”

  • Sightseeing Kabul

    “A day of sightseeing in Kabul.”

  • Airport Transfer - Depart from Kabul

    “Hotel check-out and Airport Drop-off, departing flights from Kabul.”

Highlights

Featured Attractions

Spiritual & Religious

Shah-e-Du Shamshira Mosque

The unique 'Mosque of Two Swords'.

Kabul

Landmarks

Babur's Gardens

Terraced Mughal paradise in Kabul.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Kahfroshi Bird Market

A sensory journey through the bird bazaar.

Kabul

Bazaars & Artisans

Murad Khane

Beautifully restored timber-framed old city.

Kabul

Price Per Person

From $1,890
